zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse於大約1130年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾戈登時，他的父親Sir Adam de Gordon 1st Laird Of Gordon52歲，母親Lady Alicia De Gordon38歲。他於1182年與Mrs Richard De Gordon在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾戈登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1200年在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾史雲頓享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse于大约1130年出生在苏格兰貝維其可爾戈登时，他的父亲Sir Adam de Gordon 1st Laird Of Gordon52岁，母亲Lady Alicia De Gordon38岁。他于1182年与Mrs Richard De Gordon在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾戈登结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1200年在苏格兰貝維其可爾史雲頓享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gordon,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
Jewish (from Russia): variant of   Gordon   5.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Swinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and Nottinghamshire) and Scottish (Fife): habitational name from any of various places called Swinton, for example in Berwickshire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, and Lancashire. The Lancashire, North Yorkshire, and Yorkshire placenames derive from Old English swīn ‘swine, pig’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Berwickshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Sveinn + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse was born about 1130, in Gordon, Berwickshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Adam de Gordon 1st Laird Of Gordon, was 52 and his mother, Lady Alicia De Gordon, was 38. He married Mrs Richard De Gordon in 1182, in Gordon, Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1200, in Swinton, Berwickshire, Scotland, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse est né environ 1130, à Gordon, Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Adam de Gordon 1st Laird Of Gordon, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Lady Alicia De Gordon, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Richard De Gordon en 1182, à Gordon, Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1200, à Swinton, Berwickshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse um 1130 in Gordon, Berwickshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Adam de Gordon 1st Laird Of Gordon 52 und seine Mutter Lady Alicia De Gordon 38. Er hat 1182 in Gordon, Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Mrs Richard De Gordon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1200 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Swinton, Berwickshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse è nato il circa 1130 nel Gordon, Berwickshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Adam de Gordon 1st Laird Of Gordon, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alicia De Gordon, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Richard De Gordon nel 1182, nel Gordon, Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1200, nel Swinton, Berwickshire, Scotland, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merseが約1130年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアゴルドンで生まれた時，父Sir Adam de Gordon 1st Laird Of Gordonは52歳，母Lady Alicia De Gordonは38歳であった。1182年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアゴルドンでMrs Richard De Gordonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1200年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアスウィントンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse(이)가 대략 1130년 스컷랜드 버윅실르 고든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam de Gordon 1st Laird Of Gordon(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alicia De Gordon(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1182년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르 고든에서 Mrs Richard De Gordon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1200년 스컷랜드 버윅실르 스윈턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Gordon, Berwickshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Adam de Gordon 1st Laird Of Gordon, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alicia De Gordon, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Richard De Gordon em 1182, em Gordon, Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1200, em Swinton, Berwickshire, Scotland, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse родился около 1130 г. в местности гордон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Adam de Gordon 1st Laird Of Gordon было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alicia De Gordon, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Richard De Gordon в 1182 г. в местности гордон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1200 г. в местности свинтон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard de Gordon, de Swinton 2nd Lord of Gordon in the Merse nació aproximadamente 1130, en Gordon, Berwickshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Adam de Gordon 1st Laird Of Gordon, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Lady Alicia De Gordon, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Mrs Richard De Gordon en 1182, en Gordon, Berwickshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1200, en Swinton, Berwickshire, Scotland, a la edad de 71 años.
